batches.name: Product listing surface
batches.whyGrouped: Shared product-domain components, filters, and data modeling with nullable/optional fields.

batches.name: Cart and checkout UI
batches.whyGrouped: Reducer/context behavior and checkout flow are tightly coupled and should migrate together.

batches.name: Shared utilities and admin wiring
batches.whyGrouped: Shared utility typing and remaining integration points can be stabilized once product/cart types exist.
